changes.reason: Batch D admission-only probe. Current charm_wall_breakaway_long remains the cleanest convex sleeve at 5 trades, $985.6 PnL, 234.36 PnL/exposure hour, no slow trades, and -346.8 worst MAE. Lowering only the higher-high distance from 1.0 to 0.5 tests whether nearby confirmed breakaway continuations are being missed without compressing exits or touching global vetoes.

Keep the admission expansion internally consistent by allowing a modestly less mature higher-low structure. This avoids repeating the failed exit-compression keyset and keeps the test scoped to charm-wall entry geometry rather than take-profit changes.

Allow one grid step more room above the charm wall, from 20 to 25, to test whether high-quality breakaways are being excluded by wall-distance geometry. This preserves require-breakout=true and the existing large target profile identity.

expected_effect: Should add one or two charm_wall_breakaway_long trades or recover leader-like net profit while preserving its convex 12-point target behavior. Reject if profile PnL/exposure falls below roughly 225, total net profit drops below 98% of run_001, completed trades fall, or worst MAE worsens beyond -527.
label: charm-wall-admission-probe
rationale: Choose exactly one legal family: batch_d_charm_wall_breakaway_long. Take-profit is saturated and the exact charm-wall exit-compression test already hurt, so this avoids TP keys entirely and tests admission geometry only. The profile is small-sample but high quality, and the strategist explicitly favors expanding charm_wall_breakaway_long through confirmed entries rather than reducing exits. This is not a global filter, not a stop-loss, and not missing-0DTE tuning.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: charm_wall_breakaway_long produced only 5 VALID_0DTE trades but contributed $985.6, 234.36 PnL/exposure hour, 197.12 average PnL, median MFE 146.2, no slow >=12h trades, and worst MAE -346.8. Prior exit compression lowered objective and net profit, implying the edge is convex payoff that should be protected.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Charm Wall Breakaway Admission Geometry
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Small sample risk is high; loosening wall geometry may admit weaker wall-chase entries and dilute profile efficiency without increasing total PnL.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: VALID_0DTE charm-wall breakaway context with require-breakout still true, but ES higher-high or distance-above-wall just outside current admission bounds.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Profile PnL/exposure stays >=225, total net profit is >=98% of run_001, completed trades are not starved, slow_12h_trades remains 0, and total worst MAE stays no worse than -527.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: The strongest unexpressed separator remains early path behavior: bad charm-pin tails take 80+ minutes to reach first profit, while protected extended-VWAP winners resolve quickly with median MAE near -15. Static config thresholds overlap too much with protected winners.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Charm Pin Early-Progress Tail Classifier
strategy_hypotheses.risk: A path-aware classifier can still overfit if trained on a small sample of delayed recoveries; it must preserve at least 95% of protected fast winners.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: charm_pin_pullback_long high-extension entries that fail to print early positive progress after entry.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Reduce charm_pin_pullback_long worst MAE from -527 toward <= -403 while retaining >=90% charm-pin PnL and >=95% protected fast-winner count.

strategy_plan_reference.market_regime_read: The sample is a clean long-only momentum/pullback tape with 100% realized win rate, no slow >=12h trades, low portfolio drawdown, and profits concentrated in VALID_0DTE pullback...

new_strategy_ideas.name: Charm Pin Early-Progress Tail Classifier
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Reduce charm_pin_pullback_long worst MAE from -527 toward <= -403 while retaining >=90% charm-pin PnL and >=95% protected fast-winner count.

new_strategy_ideas.name: 1DTE Pullback Companion
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Combined 1DTE PnL >= current $1298.7, 1DTE average MAE improves versus -123.1, and total net profit remains >=98% of leader.

new_strategy_ideas.name: Charm Wall Pin Avoid Activation Holdout
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Activated profile has positive standalone PnL or reduces combined charm/pin worst MAE, total net profit >=98% of leader, and fast-winner count not materially reduced.

new_strategy_ideas.name: Pullback MFE Realization Split
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: pullback_long PnL/exposure improves above 275 with total worst MAE not worse than -527 and no slow >=12h trades.
